evidence_summary: Reviewed the integrated round-297 worktree. The focused stringIndexOf test proves first Unicode-scalar substring index Some 1, absent substring None, and empty needle Some 0 through source checking, run-program, backend LLVM/object validation, emit-native/native object validation, and linked native execution. Prelude, primitive inventory, run-program, and backend/native lowering agree on __string_index_of. Planned neighbor tracers, primitive inventory, evidence scans, claim audit, git diff --check, cabal build all, cabal test, and thesis gate passed. Generated depfile churn from reviewer-run native checks was restored; controller state is unchanged by the reviewer.
